sections.subtitle: Current Form
sections.text: Como are in solid form, unbeaten in their last 8 matches with 4 wins and 4 draws. Inter have also been consistent, with no losses in their last 5 matches, including 2 wins and 3 draws. Both teams show strong attacking intent, often scoring first in recent games.

sections.subtitle: Head-to-Head Record
sections.text: Inter have dominated recent head-to-head encounters, winning all 3 of their last matchups against Como without conceding a goal. Their latest meeting on December 23, 2024, ended in a 2-0 victory for Inter, highlighting their historical edge.

sections.subtitle: Season Statistics
sections.text: Inter, sitting 2nd with 78 points, boast a superior offensive record with 77 goals scored compared to Como's 49 (10th place, 49 points). Inter's defense is also stronger, conceding only 35 goals against Como's 50. Como, however, excels in ball possession (55.2%, 5th rank) and pressing (1st in possessions won in the final third).

sections.subtitle: Key Players and Absences
sections.text: Como miss several key players like Assane Diao, which could impact their attack, though players like Nico Paz (7.25 rating) remain a threat. Inter are without Lautaro Martínez and Hakan Çalhanoğlu, but Marcus Thuram (14 goals) and in-form Denzel Dumfries (7.9 rating last 5 matches) can fill the gap.

sections.subtitle: Match Dynamics
sections.text: Como's home form and pressing could challenge Inter, but Inter's superior quality and finishing are likely to prevail. Expect a competitive match with Inter controlling key moments, while Como may struggle to convert chances against a tight defense.
